name: aem-page-audit
description: Fingerprint Adobe AEM page, clientlibs, and privacy processors — not a penetration test

steps.text: Skill aem-site-agent + privacy-host-map. Empty d41d8cd9 clientlib = empty stub. Not legal advice.

steps.goal: Using skill aem-site-agent and knowledge/aem/aem-patterns.md plus any relevant knowledge/privacy AC AEM host maps, produce: (1) AEM fingerprint verdict (2) clientlib inventory (3) empty-stub callout if present (4) data layer / Coveo / Launch / GTM / Shielded notes (5) full privacy host table LOAD/CONFIG/CLICK/BUNDLE (6) content domain handoff (7) non-claims. If user pasted non-AEM HTML, say so and stop AEM procedures.
criteria: AEM vs not-AEM verdict with evidence
Empty clientlib hash explained if present
